scripts.dev: nodemon --ext js,json --signal SIGINT --watch src --watch server.js --delay 1000ms server.js
scripts.dev:debug: DEBUG=mcp:* LOG_LEVEL=debug nodemon --ext js,json --signal SIGINT --watch src --watch server.js server.js
scripts.quest:dev: QUEST_MODE=true DEBUG=mcp:* nodemon --ext js,json --signal SIGINT --watch src --watch server.js server.js
scripts.setup:quest-mode: node -e "console.log('🚀 Quest Mode setup complete! MCP Server ready for Qoder IDE.');"
scripts.tf:plan: cd terraform && terraform init -upgrade && terraform plan
scripts.tf:apply: cd terraform && terraform init -upgrade && terraform apply -auto-approve
